mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_PROJECT (workSpaceNo, creatorNo, name, description, startDt, endDt, createdDt, updatedDt) VALUES (#{workSpaceNo}, #{memberNo}, #{request.name}, #{request.description}, #{request.startDt}, #{request.endDt}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO SAAS_PROJECT_MEMBER (projectNo, memberNo, role) VALUES (#{projectNo}, #{memberNo}, #{role})
mapper.select: SELECT SP.projectNo, SP.creatorNo AS memberNo, SM.nickname, SP.name, SP.description, SP.startDt, SP.endDt, SP.createdDt, SP.updatedDt FROM SAAS_PROJECT SP JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SP.creatorNo WHERE SP.projectNo = #{projectNo} AND SP.deletedDt IS NULL

SELECT DISTINCT SP.projectNo, SP.creatorNo AS memberNo, SM.nickname, SP.name, SP.description, SP.startDt, SP.endDt, SP.createdDt, SP.updatedDt FROM SAAS_PROJECT SP JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SP.creatorNo JOIN SAAS_PROJECT_MEMBER SPM ON SPM.projectNo = SP.projectNo WHERE SPM.memberNo = #{memberNo} AND SP.deletedDt IS NULL ORDER BY SP.createdDt DESC

SELECT SPM.pjMemberNo, SPM.projectNo, SPM.memberNo, SM.nickname, SL.email, SPM.role FROM SAAS_PROJECT_MEMBER SPM JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SPM.memberNo INNER JOIN SAAS_LOGIN SL ON SL.memberNo = SPM.memberNo WHERE SPM.projectNo = #{projectNo} ORDER BY SPM.pjMemberNo

SELECT SPM.pjMemberNo, SPM.projectNo, SPM.memberNo, SM.nickname, SL.email, SPM.role FROM SAAS_PROJECT_MEMBER SPM JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SPM.memberNo INNER JOIN SAAS_LOGIN SL ON SL.memberNo = SPM.memberNo WHERE SPM.projectNo = #{projectNo} AND SPM.memberNo = #{memberNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE SAAS_PROJECT SET name = #{request.name}, description = #{request.description}, endDt = #{request.endDt}, updatedDt = NOW() WHERE projectNo = #{projectNo} AND creatorNo = #{memberNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
